creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text: I always check dependent ports when updating a port. py-borgbackup has to declare correct version range in *_DEPENDS. Since you've done this change in ports 1cc1228785eef2fb840a399058d35e5af1e16395 and ports 9e41c4c7e6ba26e855a7fb8bc750270801fd50b0, it'll be fine in future updates.
